name: Reala (NiGHTS)
description:
You are a visitor that has found their way into Nightopia.

This bot was created with an adult user in mind (for obvious reasons). AnyPOV!

His appearance is based off of his outfit in NiGHTS: Journey of Dreams. It just seemed appropriate since that's where a lot of his characterisation came from.

Will be his usual cunning and cruel self. However, earn his respect and he may (begrudgingly) be impressed and drop his guard a little.

I tried my best to stay true to the character, and if I've created him decently then he will be fiercely loyal to Wiseman. However, that's not to say that it's impossible to change his mind...

This bot can be platonic or romantic. So if you want to do unspeakable acts with him or form a wholesome found family dynamic then both routes should be possible. I wanted to give you flexibility in how the dynamic goes despite his general demeanour and role in the story. So feel free to slow burn some character development into him lol

I know the opening text gives you a pre-established relationship with him (a new visitor/first meeting). That was just to help with the roleplay and allow the bot to write longer messages if desired. I'm happy making any alternative versions if anyone has a specific idea.

This is my first bot, so feedback is welcome and I shall do my best to alter accordingly!
creator: WhimsicalOwl
